seo.metaTitle: Declarion Platform – Automating Continuous Compliance & Third-Party Risk Management
seo.metaDescription: The Declarion platform enables continuous compliance, efficient third-party risk management, and audit-proof evidence. Automate compliance processes and pass audits in a structured and efficient way at any time.

hero.title: The Declarion Advantages: Automate compliance, reduce risks, pass audits with confidence.
hero.titleHighlight: Declarion provides a structured, automated approach to continuous compliance and third-party risk management – with clearly documented evidence and processes that are audit-ready at all times.
benefits: Central platform for compliance evidence, controls, and documentation.
Automated evidence collection instead of manual audit preparation.
Transparency over risks from third parties, suppliers, and service providers.
Structured processes that significantly reduce the workload for internal teams.
Audit-ready documentation of all relevant information at any time.
Scalable compliance structures for growing organizations.

items.title: Integration
items.description: Declarion can be quickly integrated into existing compliance and governance structures. The platform is ready for productive use within a few weeks – with clearly defined processes and minimal implementation effort for your team.

items.title: Operational Support
items.description: Our team supports you in setting up your compliance processes in a structured way within the platform. This includes, among other things, structuring controls and evidence, setting up third-party risk assessments, defining audit trails, and establishing clear documentation standards.

items.title: Onboarding & Enablement
items.description: We guide your team through the successful introduction of the platform, including onboarding and training, best-practice structures for compliance processes, and integration into existing governance frameworks. The goal is fast operational use with minimal friction.

items.title: Continuous compliance instead of point-in-time preparation
items.description: Many organizations only start compiling compliance evidence shortly before audits. Declarion enables continuous and structured evidence collection, ensuring you are always audit-ready.

items.title: Pan-European Service
items.description: Declarion supports companies based within the European Union – regardless of industry, organizational structure, or company size.

items.title: Transparency on Third-Party Risks
items.description: Suppliers, service providers, and partners can pose significant regulatory risks. Declarion helps organizations systematically capture, assess, and document third-party risks in a transparent and traceable way.

items.title: Audit-Ready Evidence
items.description: All relevant compliance evidence is documented in a structured manner, versioned, and stored in an audit-proof way. This creates a reliable foundation for both internal and external audits.

items.title: Efficiency for Compliance Teams
items.description: Through structured workflows, centralized documentation, and automated evidence collection, Declarion significantly reduces the operational workload for compliance and governance teams.

cta.title: Ready for Continuous Compliance?
cta.buttonText: Request a demo / Explore the platform
